title: Parse a Markdown Table Into Records
description: Parse a markdown table (as often returned by models) into a list of dicts keyed by header.
problem: Write parse_md_table(text) that takes a markdown table string (header row, separator row, data rows, each '|'-delimited) and returns a list of dicts mapping header->cell value (stripped strings).
hint: Split text into lines, split each line on '|', strip empty edges and whitespace. First line = headers, skip second line (---), zip remaining rows with headers.
